data.content: Strengthened settings UI pizzazz by adding prominent purple/green gradients and interaction accents across OpenRouter controls (header, info bar, API key panel, selected model badges, model browser/table, security dialog). Quality gates passed: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1943 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated to origin/main as 7736672.
